title: potentilla neglecta var. acutifida
intro: Potentilla neglecta var. acutifida is a rare and lesser-known variant of the Potentilla neglecta plant, also known as the 'valerian-leaved cinquefoil'. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help to soothe and protect wounds. The plant's leaves and stems have been traditionally used in herbal preparations to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, such as congestion and coughing. In herbal preparations, Potentilla neglecta var. acutifida is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
